mainEntity.name: How do I file a workers comp claim if injured working for Murray City Utah?
mainEntity.text: How do I file a workers comp claim if injured working for Murray City Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Download Murray City's Employee Injury Report, authorize release to Workers Compensation Fund, report to supervisor, and submit to Risk Management. For third-party claims against the city, use the notarized Claim Form mailed to 10 E 4800 South or emailed to Risk@murray.utah.gov.

suggestedAnswer.text: Murray City employees must use specific forms authorizing medical record release. City claims go through Travelers; no employee can admit liability. Strict Utah deadlines apply—file promptly or lose rights. Opposing parties may dispute; legal counsel ensures proper filing amid common procedural denials.

name: Filing Claims for Murray City Work Injuries
